body_excerpt:
Web Image Monitor provided by Ricoh Company, Ltd. is a web server that is included in and runs on laser printers and MFPs (multifunction printers). Web Image Monitor contains the vulnerability listed below.
  • Open redirect (CWE-601) - CVE-2026-41226
Tony Kirkland of Sixgen Inc reported this vulnerability to Ricoh Company, Ltd. directly and coordinated. After the coordination, Ricoh Company, Ltd. reported this case to IPA under Information Security Early Warning Partnership, and JPCERT/CC coordinated with Ricoh Company, Ltd. for JVN publication.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

products: 国内外の脆弱性対策情報DB

title: Open redirect vulnerability in multiple laser printers and MFPs which implement Ricoh Web Image Monitor
